summary: 6 independent evidence sources confirm Observe/Evaluate is the hardest agent-loop stage to control in this project: (1) TextGrad score 1.000 false positive from sampling bias, (2) v3 benchmark environment disconnect causing 3 different output modes, (3) Agda compiler returns 0 errors but ~17 warnings (no clear failure signal), (4) Python import bug in geometry.py not caught by test framework (only found when tests fail to import), (5) fresh verification confirms tests pass and Agda compiles, (6) the 11 eval tasks in eval_tasks_v3_project.py are all designed around the challenge of evaluating correctness in a formal-math project
